FatherCategoryId.description: ID of the father category, apply in case of category and subcategory.

IsActive.description: Shows if the category is active (`true`) or not (`false`).

LomadeeCampaignCode.description: This is a legacy field. Do not take this information into consideration.

AdWordsRemarketingCode.description: This is a legacy field. Do not take this information into consideration.

ShowInStoreFront.description: Defines if the category is shown on side and upper menu (`true`) or not (`false`).

ShowBrandFilter.description: Defines if the category has brand filter (`true`) or not (`false`).

ActiveStoreFrontLink.description: Defines if the category has an active link on the website (`true`) or not (`false`).

StockKeepingUnitSelectionMode.description: Defines how the SKU will be exhibited.

HasChildren.description: Defines if the category has child categories (`true`) or not (`false`).

example.Name: Home Appliances
example.Title: Home Appliances
example.Description: Discover our range of home appliances. Find smart vacuums, kitchen and laundry appliances to suit your needs. Order online now.
